    U

    updateLastLogin(String, String) - Method in class View.AdminHome

    updateLastLogin(String, String, String) - Method in class Controller.SQLite
    Records the timestamp and status (SUCCESS / FAILED) of the last login attempt.
    updatePassword(String, String) - Method in class Controller.SQLite
    Stores a BCrypt-hashed password for the given user.
    updateProduct(String, String, int, double) - Method in class Controller.SQLite
    Updates product details identified by oldName.
    updateUserRole(String, int) - Method in class Controller.SQLite
    Changes a user's role.
